HOME.TITLE: Welcome to Badgelo
HOME.DESCRIPTION: Badgelo is a badge management app for events. Create, manage and print participant badges.
HOME.HERO_SUB: Create beautiful badges and image previews in seconds.
HOME.QUICK_DESC: Get results quickly with intuitive tools.
HOME.SECURE_DESC: Your images and data stay private.

FAST.TITLE: Fast editing
FAST.DESC: Optimized workflow to edit badges and photos quickly.

CUSTOM.TITLE: Custom badges
CUSTOM.DESC: Add text, colors and styles to match your brand.

SHARE.TITLE: Export & Share
SHARE.DESC: Download or share your badges with a click.

ORGANIZERS.TITLE: Event Organizers
ORGANIZERS.DESC: Create and print badges for conferences and meetups.

MARKETERS.TITLE: Marketers
MARKETERS.DESC: Design branded badges for promotions and campaigns.

VOLUNTEERS.TITLE: Volunteers
VOLUNTEERS.DESC: Quickly prepare identification badges for teams.

QUOTE1.TEXT: Perfect for creating visuals for birthday parties.

QUOTE2.TEXT: Simple, fast and reliable — highly recommended.

HOME.CTA_DESC: Start now for free — upload an image or try a template.
